final_response:
**Service Accounts (UID < 1000):**

| Name | Shell |
|------|-------|
| root | /bin/bash |
| daemon | /usr/sbin/nologin |
| bin | /usr/sbin/nologin |
| sys | /usr/sbin/nologin |
| www-data | /usr/sbin/nologin |
| postgres | /bin/bash |

There are 6 service accounts with UIDs less than 1000. Most of them use `/usr/sbin/nologin` as their shell (which prevents interactive login), while `root` and `postgres` have `/bin/bash` as their shells.
